question_text: Derive the condition for constructive and destructive interference using principle of superposition.
Explain Newton’s Rings experiment. How are wavelength and refractive index determined?
Derive the expression for intensity distribution in Fraunhofer diffraction due to a single slit and obtain condition for minima.
Explain diffraction grating. Define and explain dispersive power and resolving power (qualitative).
Explain polarization by reflection and double refraction. Describe Nicol’s prism and wave plates (HWP & QWP).
Explain space lattice, unit cell, Bravais lattices and crystal systems (3D).
Derive packing fraction for SC, BCC and FCC structures.
Explain Miller indices and derive expression for interplanar spacing in cubic crystals.
State and derive Bragg’s law. Explain its significance.
Explain Laue’s method and Powder method for crystal structure determination.
Derive expressions for electronic and ionic polarization.
Derive Clausius–Mossotti equation and explain Lorentz internal field.
Explain frequency dependence of polarization and dielectric loss.
Classify magnetic materials (Dia, Para, Ferro, Anti-ferro, Ferri).
Explain domain theory of ferromagnetism and hysteresis curve. Differentiate soft and hard magnetic materials.
Explain dual nature of matter and Heisenberg’s Uncertainty Principle.
Derive time-independent Schrödinger wave equation and solve particle in 1D infinite potential well.
Explain quantum free electron theory. Define Fermi energy and density of states.
Explain formation of energy bands and classification of solids.
Explain intrinsic and extrinsic semiconductors. Derive carrier concentration expression and explain Hall effect with applications.
